---
title: "Formula for Vaccine Effectiveness"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02-sp03"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01"
toc: True
---









<!-- Standard workflow: content imported from Word -->
<!-- Advanced users may edit directly -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Relative Risk</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="../03-calculating-vaccine-effectiveness/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Calculating Vaccine Effectiveness</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
